title: ROOTS - Circular policies for changing the biowaste system
subtitle: [version 1; peer review: 2 approved]
description: A policy letter proposing recommendations to overcome regulatory barriers and bottlenecks in urban biowaste valorisation within the European circular bioeconomy. It summarises collaborative insights from five Horizon 2020 projects and provides specific governance-level actions to enhance prevention, recycling, by-product status, and market uptake of bioproducts.
